data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your students!

🗓️Mission Normal*2: 12/20(Mon) 19:00 – 12/24 (Fri) 18:59 (UTC)
🗓️Mission Hard*2: 12/24(Fri) 19:00 – 12/27 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
